definition: ICT's simplified daily workflow — market_maker_model applied step by step with specific time filters.

daily_workflow.step_1_bias: market_structure: Read D1/H4 for direction + dealing_range.
daily_workflow.step_2_DOL: draw_on_liquidity: Identify WHERE price needs to go (PDH/PDL, equal H/L, HTF OBs/FVGs).
daily_workflow.step_4_manipulation: judas_swing / liquidity_sweep: Identify the fake move.
daily_workflow.step_5_confirmation: displacement: Wait for FVG + BOS/CHoCH confirming real direction.
daily_workflow.step_6_entry: optimal_trade_entry: Enter retracement into FVG/OB from step 5.
daily_workflow.step_7_management: SL beyond step 4's sweep. TP at step 2's DOL. Partial at TP1, trail to TP2.

key_principle: This model works because it WAITS for all pieces across all layers. Most losses come from skipping a layer.
